experience.description: Architected the AI Agents for discover the apps your employees are using, detect potential risks by tracking app scopes, and prevent compliance gaps before they escalate.
Optimized open-model inference pipelines and implemented quantization for efficient multi-device GenAI deployment.
Built a full stack web application called SmartGoals for the company to track their employees goals and progress.
Built AI frame prediction models (CNNs/RNNs) to optimize GPU workload and improve game performance and frame rates by 15%.
Developed a deep learning model to detect anomalies in customer conversations and improved the accuracy of the model

milestones.title: Winner - Smart India Hackathon 2025 (Software Edition)
milestones.description: Won the Smart India Hackathon 2025 (Software Edition) for building an AI Powered Safety Routing Application for Womens in Metropolitian Cities.

milestones.title: Best Social Inclined Innovation Project (IITM Shastra TechFest)
milestones.description: Awarded the title of "Best Socially Inclined Innovation Project" for my project titled "Medi-Drone" at the Shaastra Tech Fest 2022, hosted by the Indian Institute of Technology, Madras. The project involves the deployment of a fully automated drone capable of carrying loads exceeding 4 kilograms across a distance of more than 20 kilometers. Notably, the drone itself weighs 1.5 kilograms.
